issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks in the post-referral workflow. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the glitch.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Loan officer update not reflected in automated agent emails
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails to the agent continued to display the previous loan officer's information instead of the updated one. The fix was handled by Luis on the product side. Root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually verify that agent-facing emails reflect the correct loan officer for any deals where an LO change occurred around the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved from Offer Accepted back to a prior stage and then updated to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the workflow to include it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to prevent tasks from firing on these statuses. The fix was confirmed on March 9, 2026.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for Closed Lost or Transferred deals during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, leaving TCs without tasks to manage the transaction. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved. Root cause was not explicitly disclosed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 that did not receive TC workflow tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not generating tasks after referral accepted on March 18
issues.desc: A deal accepted as a referral on March 18, 2026 did not generate any post-referral workflow tasks. The root cause was identified as a data-pulling error that prevented the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually review and complete any post-referral tasks for deals accepted around March 18 that did not receive automated task generation.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage before closing info available
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was being sent at the Offer Accepted stage, before closing information had been submitted and the credit amount could be calculated. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage with the actual dollar amount included. The issue was confirmed to be a Dash-triggered communication and was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually send the correct buyer credit SMS with the actual dollar amount to any buyers who received the premature message during the Offer Accepted stage.
